channel.title: Cybersecurity, Cloud and Compiler
channel.description: Insights into Cybersecurity, Cloud computing, and Compiler

item.title: The Napkin Architecture Series - Secret Zero, Jenkins, Ansible, and Vault
item.description: Solved the "Secret Zero" Problem with Jenkins, Ansible, and Vault
item.author: nerd@supasaf.com (Supa Safe)

item.title: A Tale of Two Clouds - AWS RDS Proxy vs. Tencent Cloud CAM
item.description: A quick look at database security architectures, contrasting the middleware pattern of AWS RDS Proxy with the client-side approach of Tencent Cloud CAM.
item.author: nerd@supasaf.com (Supa Safe)
